validation.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.slugMinLength: Slug must be at least 2 characters
validation.slugPattern: Only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens

stepCreateOrg.title: Create organization

validation.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.slugMinLength: Slug must be at least 2 characters

stepRegionalConfig.title: Regional settings
stepRegionalConfig.subtitle: We detected your preferences — confirm or adjust
stepRegionalConfig.localeHint: Automatically sets currency, country and language
stepRegionalConfig.timezoneHint: Defines how "today" and "this week" are interpreted in reports

stepFunnelConfig.title: Configure funnel
stepFunnelConfig.subtitle: Define the steps you want to track
stepFunnelConfig.validationMinStep: Add at least 1 step to the funnel

stepApiKey.title: API key + Installation
stepApiKey.subtitle: Paste a script on your site and data arrives automatically
stepApiKey.generateErrorToast: Error generating API key. Try again.
stepApiKey.keyWarning: This key authenticates all events for {orgName}. Do not commit to Git — use an environment variable (NEXT_PUBLIC_GROWARE_KEY).
stepApiKey.snippetHint: Paste in the <head> of any page. The tracker captures UTMs, device, referrer and pageviews automatically.
stepApiKey.identifyDescription: After login, link the anonymous session to the user profile. This enables per-customer attribution, session history and behavioral analysis by segment.
stepApiKey.stepsConfigured: {count, plural, =1 {# step configured} other {# steps configured}}
stepApiKey.noStepsConfigured: No funnel steps configured. Go back to the previous step to define your funnel.

optionalEvent.title: Optional event: checkout_started
optionalEvent.description: If your flow has a checkout (modal, redirect or separate page), add this event before purchase. It enables checkout abandonment analysis — how many users got here but didn't convert. The tracker detects abandonment automatically via beforeunload.

stepInstallTracker.title: Install tracker
stepInstallTracker.subtitle: API key, snippet and real-time verification
stepInstallTracker.sdkGridDescription: Select your project's framework or language to see a personalized installation tutorial.

tutorial.title: Integrate with {sdk}
tutorial.descriptionWeb: Install the tracker in your project and start capturing events automatically.
tutorial.descriptionServer: Send server-side events via HTTP POST to the Groware API.
tutorial.aiPromptTitle: Use our prompt and let AI do everything
tutorial.aiPromptDescription: Paste this prompt in your AI assistant (Cursor, ChatGPT, Copilot) and it will handle the entire integration automatically.
tutorial.docsHint: For more details on events and properties, check the

stepGateway.title: Connect payment gateway
stepGateway.subtitle: Link your revenue to the acquisition channel — see where each customer came from
stepGateway.calloutDescription: The tracker captures UTMs, channel and funnel. The gateway brings real revenue. Together, you see how much each channel generated.
stepGateway.mercadoPagoDescription: Payments in Brazil via Mercado Pago

stepVerifyEvent.waitingForEvents: Waiting for events from the last 5 minutes...

verified.title: All set, {firstName}!
verified.subtitle: Events arriving. Your dashboard is ready to use.

unverified.title: Almost there, {firstName}!
unverified.nextStepDescription: Install the tracker in your project and come back to see your data. Use the prompt below to integrate with AI in seconds.
